title: Bedrock Jockey
description: This mod makes baby zombies seek out Bedrock exclusive mounts so they can become jockeys.
body:
**Requires [Jockey API](https://modrinth.com/mod/jockey-api)**

This mod makes baby zombies seek out Bedrock exclusive mounts so they can become jockeys. Zombies, zombie villagers, husks, and zombie piglins are all supported!

## Other Jockey Mods
- [Chicken Jockey](https://modrinth.com/mod/chickenjockey)
- [Dolphin Jockey](https://modrinth.com/mod/dolphin-jockey)
- [Spider Jockey](https://modrinth.com/mod/spider-jockey)
